english translation text: PLEASE REMAIN SILENT DURING  NAMAAZ
Du’a after Salaat for the month of Rajab

In the Name of Allah,
the All-merciful, the
All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Alláh bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

O He Whom alone I hope
for all good things;
and Whose wrath I do not expect when I do wrong;

O He Who recompenses
the little deed with very much reward;

O He Who answers him
who begs Him;

arabic text: يَا مَنْ يُعْطي مَنْ لَمْ يَسْأَلْهُ
english translation text:
O He Who gives those
who do not ask Him

arabic text: وَمَنْ لَمْ يَعْرِفْهُ تَحَنُّناً مِنْهُ وَرَحْمَةً،
english translation text:
and do not even recognize Him out of His kindness
and mercifulness:

arabic text: أَعْطِنِي بِمَسْأَلتِي إيَّاكَ مِنْ جَمِيعِ خَيْرِ الدُّنْيَا،
english translation text:
(please do) give me, for
I pray You, the whole
welfare of this world

and the whole welfare
of the Next World;

and save me, for I
pray You,

the whole evil of this
world and the Next
World

Verily, all that which You
give is unblemished.

(Please do) increase Your favours upon me, O the
All-generous.

O the Lord of Majesty
and Honor;
O the Lord of Bliss and Magnanimity;
O the Lord of Favor and Munificence;

please do rescue my
white-hair beard from Hellfire.
